description_long: This is a classic urban fire hydrant with a cylindrical red body and a domed, metallic gray top. The hydrant features two prominent side outlets and a central front outlet, each capped with a round, bolted cover. The surface is visibly weathered, with patches of paint wear and grime, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. Vertical ridges reinforce the lower body, and the base is flanged for secure mounting to the ground. The top dome is ribbed and secured with bolts, typical of cast iron hydrants. No chains are attached to the caps, and some markings are faintly visible on the front.
description: A weathered red fire hydrant with a metallic gray domed top, three capped outlets, and visible surface wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet, two side outlets, and faint markings on the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the left outlet and the domed top, with surface wear visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the hydrant, with no outlets and more pronounced paint wear.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right outlet and the ribbed body structure.
